pressReleases.title: Metadise Grand Launch Highlights
pressReleases.excerpt: A recap of our grand launch moments and milestones, shared on our official Instagram channel.

pressReleases.title: Metadise Expands Academy Offerings for 2026
pressReleases.excerpt: Metadise Academy announces expanded training tracks to support Sarawak's growing digital talent pipeline.
content: Metadise Academy is expanding its 2026 course offerings to meet growing demand for practical digital skills across industries.
The expanded lineup includes programmes in AI, cybersecurity, blockchain, digitalisation, and e-commerce, designed for learners and teams at different experience levels.
This initiative reflects Metadise's commitment to accessible, impact-driven training and talent development in Sarawak.
